programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren and Brian plot different courses to prove they're courageous men, until danger unites them.

programme.title: Ninja III: The Domination
programme.desc: Possessed by the spirit of a diabolical Ninja assassin and dominated by his relentless rage, a young, attractive woman sets out to brutally attack and destroy his enemies. Can her boyfriend and a martial arts master possibly save her soul?

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: When one of the US Air Force’s most modern tactical aircraft crashes in the sea near Malta, the CIA dispatches their best agent to salvage the plane's advanced weapons system before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Ninja
programme.desc: A Westerner named Casey, studying Ninjutsu in Japan, is asked by the Sensei to return to New York to protect the legendary Yoroi Bitsu, an armored chest containing the weapons of the last Koga Ninja.

programme.title: Ninja: Shadow Of A Tear
programme.desc: Ninjutsu master Casey is back and out for revenge when his pregnant wife is murdered.

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL fights off airport terrorists planning to bomb the State of the Union address.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: Quinn, a member of a SWAT unit, steps out of a park fountain in an Asian city with no recollection of who he is or where he came from. As he pieces together clues from his past, he vaguely recalls his young daughter, who has been kidnapped.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike is a tough hitman, who makes his hits look like accidents or suicide. He's in a gang of hitmen, each with his own style. When his loved ex is killed, Mike looks for those responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The city gathers at Angel Grove Park for a Power Ranger celebration, the Mayor wants to thank the Rangers for their heroics in defending the city from Rita's attacks.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Zords are recharging after taking a fierce beating from Cyclopsis. Lokar and Cyclopsis set forth to destroy Angel Grove. Zordon warns the teens that their Zords will not be ready for another twelve hours.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the teens go to the park to plant saplings for their science project, Rita sends down Squatt to plant her evil Octoplant. Bulk and Skull, who are nearby, are scared by Squatt and run into a portable bathroom which is picked up by a dump truck.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: It's the return of Pudgy Pig! When the Power Rangers participate in Angel Grove’s Adopt a Pet day, a little old lady leaves them her pet pig, Norman.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Billy, who has an aversion toward fish, picnics at the park pond with Kimberly while the others go scuba diving. Aware of Billy's weakness, Rita creates her poisonous Goo Fish monster to destroy the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The teens compete in their high school Oddball Games and win the coveted Noble Lion Trophy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the Power Rangers go up to Billy's uncle's mountain resort to study for their science test, Goldar seizes the opportunity of having them altogether to call on the Crystal of Nightmares.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: While the teens are discussing the sad possibility that Ernie may have to close down the Youth Center due to financial problems, Jason shows up with an adorable stray dog.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The class project is a time capsule and all our power teens bring something significant to class to share with future generations. Mrs. Appleby contributes a photo of the Power Rangers, which makes Rita immensely jealous.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Trini is having some difficulties learning the Praying Mantis technique from kung fu expert, Master Lee. He assures her that her technique will improve with time and with some additional practice.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When all of the Power Rangers’ parents gather at the Youth Center for Parents Day, Rita seizes the opportunity to create the "Dramole Monster" which traps all the parents in her Dimension of Darkness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy, the Rangers’ only hope, is teleported to the Command Center by Alpha. Zordon reveals that he can restore Tommy's power by draining his own energy and infusing it into Tommy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When Billy gets a "B" on a test instead of his usual "A," he fears he will not make The Young Scientists of America club.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy team up to teach a self-defense class to middle-aged women. Bulk and Skull join the class -- thinking that it will be an opportunity to meet "babes."

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Bulk and Skull make a nuisance of themselves by attempting to juggle balls at a party for a group of kids, but Zack manages to scare them off with a pair of rubber snakes. An impressed Angela gives Zack a peck on the cheek.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is a contestant with a chance to win a car on a tacky horror comedy game show called Trick or Treat. Her opponent is none other than Skull.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Zack try to help young Roger make Ernie's junior soccer team. The eavesdropping Rita commands the creation of a monster to kick around the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy volunteer their time at the Youth Center to teach a Karate class to kids. Their teamwork gives Rita the idea for her latest monster, the "Slippery Shark.”

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly helps her insecure younger cousin Kelly try out for the Angel Grove Junior High cheerleading team. Kelly, however, feels that she cannot measure up to her beautiful talented cousin, who is still remembered for being an outstanding cheerleader.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy decides to try out for football but is afraid that he won’t be any good at it since he has never played football before. Ernie, a former football player himself, agrees to help Tommy train at the Juice Bar for his football tryout.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lately, Tommy has been having trouble remembering things. When Mrs. Appleby gives her class an assignment that requires the students to change their biggest faults, the teens decide to help Tommy deal with his forgetfulness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: As Angela's birthday approaches, Zack would like to win her affections again by buying her a pair of pearl earrings.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita Repulsa's minions abandon her when an even more evil menace arrives at the Moon.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd steals the power of the Zords away from the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers obtain new Zords to defeat Piranhtis Head.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd attacks with a monster that can morph from one Power Ranger into another.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Goldar plans to steal Tommy's Green Ranger powers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers use an unusual defense against a vain monster sent by Lord Zedd.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Stag Beetle Monster drains Tommy's powers in an attack on Angel Grove.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers face Monster Venus Fly Traps as they try to rescue Hallie from Lord Zedd's island stronghold.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.desc: Alex, Thad, and Radon receive a message from an unknown woman.

programme.desc: Denholm forces everyone at Reynholm Industries to take a stress test, then threatens to ax anyone who's still experiencing stress by day's end.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky books a two-month summer job in Maine and decides to take Lucy and Little Ricky. For the summer, they want to sublet their apartment at a profit, but their friends and landlords, the Mertzes, are not in favor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo hires business manager Mr. Hickox to solve the family budget problems. Lucy, dissatisfied with her new $5 per month allowance, manages to find a loophole in the business manager's system.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy agrees to help her neighbor Fred Mertz impress an old vaudeville buddy who's in town for a visit. Lucy poses as the Mertzes maid "Bessie" to make Barney Kurtz believe Fred hit it big in real estate.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis crack a killing ring during the investigation of a Navy officer's murder; McCoy and Ross fight for prosecution authority.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Prosecutors question a gunman's culpability when a medical report on the victim of a drive-by shooting raises suspicions about a doctor.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a new mother's death and the disappearance of her baby, leading prosecutors to probe the husband's role in the affair.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bail bondsman's death leads detectives to a corrupt lawyer with a connection to the district attorney's office.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A killer's confession prompts detectives to reopen a deadly arson case involving a family with ties to Schiff.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An accident that kills three people hits close to home for Curtis and brings back painful memories for McCoy.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A forensic specialist is targeted by killers, challenging Briscoe and Curtis to find a suspect; McCoy and Ross turn up evidence on the victim.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives search for the killer of a physician who had a dangerous sex life; an attorney maintains murders are a result of too much television.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives seek a motive for a man's brutal beating; Ross uncovers an unlikely accomplice in the assault case.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura decides to find out for herself if a hermit (John Anderson) is really a maniac.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Widow Snider (Bonnie Bartlett) scheme to get dates for the spring dance.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A dying widow (Patricia Neal) asks the Ingalls to help find homes for her children.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When it appears the widow's children must be separated, Mr. Edwards makes an announcement.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson complicates the Ingallses' long-awaited camping vacation by deciding that she and her family should go along.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura thinks she has found gold and imagines the glamorous life it can buy.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Mary's plans to raise money for the pastor's birthday by investing the Sunday-school funds backfire.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Isaiah Edwards attempts to bond with his newly adopted son and buys him a rifle so that the pair can go hunting together; his son, an avid reader, has no interest in hunting.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A voice-recording device broadcasts Laura's love for a new boy (Eric Shea) all over town.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Caroline is away with Mary at an arithmetic championship, Laura has a hard time filling her mother's shoes at home.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A deadly infection fells Caroline before she can join her family on a camping trip.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles and Mr. Edwards end up racing against time to rescue Mary, Laura and a friend from a runaway caboose.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A strict teacher (Richard Basehart) develops an instant dislike for Laura.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: During a recession, Charles and Mr. Edwards join two others in order to transport the highly explosive liquid dynamite.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Rumors fly when Charles performs odd jobs for a widow to get a china set for Caroline.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: Prince: Kiss the Rain
programme.desc: Few artists are as prolific as Prince. The king of self-transformation, Prince made his mark on an entire generation. He redefined popular music and reshaped the music industry. But the enigma of Prince held many untold secrets- join us on this in-dept...

programme.title: Prince: Purple Reign
programme.desc: In recent times, music lovers have been confounded with the tragic and shocking news that some of their most beloved stars had passed away in controversial circumstances.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Life, Death, and Legacy
programme.desc: In this film we take an intimate look into life of one of the worlds most successful entertainers of all time, a man dubbed as the King of Pop.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong: 100th Anniversary
programme.desc: Louis Armstrong dazzled millions of fans with his virtuoso trumpet playing and his irresistible vocal style. Celebrate his life as past performances are revisited and first hand accounts of his life are given by individuals touched by him.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Hendrix (2000)
programme.desc: On stage, Jimi Hendrix (Wood Harris) electrified audiences with his powerful guitar playing and mesmerizing performances. But behind the scenes -- fueled by a dark haze of drugs and alcohol -- this rising star was on a crash course with destiny.

programme.title: The Story of Jay-Z

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace un año Diana conoció en una red social a Juan Manuel, sin embargo, nunca se han visto, ni han hablado por videollamadas. El día en el que se iban a conocer en persona, Juan Manuel tuvo un accidente de tránsito y perdió la vida.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex en la villa, que no le cae muy bien a todos, pero parece que habrá una reconciliación. Norma está celosa por Sargento y Renata. En la fiesta de togas, Montse y Ernesto coquetean. Sargento se altera y casi llega a los golpes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: La manada más salvaje
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Diana se perfilan como las más odiadas del grupo, mientras que el nuevo ex le quita el lugar a Christian. Yurgenis avanza con Brandon y una fiesta salvaje rompe con todo lo que ellos creían de sí mismos.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra
programme.desc: La tablet manda a Ana e Isaac a una cita romántica y Leslie tambalea. La sala tornado abre sus puertas y sus vientos traen muchas dudas. Lizbeth y Diana planean una broma que no termina nada bien. La llegada del próximo ex podría ser devastadora.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Viewing a heated argument from his hotel window, Matlock witnesses a murder involving two stars of a local theater production and an unhappy husband. When he helps investigate the case, his memory becomes a bit blurred.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: The serenity of historic Roanoke Island is shattered when a retired career soldier attempts to prove his late brother’s death was not a hunting accident, but murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Working with a young Deputy Sheriff, Conrad McMasters, Matlock begins to pick away at the pattern of cover-ups, exposing information about a money-laundering scheme, local corruption, and a tightly-knit group of drug dealers.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock defends Anne Johnson, a single mother who’s been accused of murdering her recently estranged boyfriend.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock tries to defend hard-drinking country singer Jimmy Legrand after he’s arrested for the murder of his wife’s sister, but Legrand was so drunk on the night of the crime that he honestly can’t remember if he killed her.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: It’s a race against time as Matlock tries to save conman Adam Spangler from being executed for a murder he claims he never committed.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock recalls in flashbacks the racially tense 1960’s. At the time, he was a defense attorney representing African-American Cyrus Jordan – a talented cook charged with murdering the bullying white sheriff.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: After the death of the second of three boys who witnessed a murder 15 years ago, the trial of Ben's client requires the exposure of the secrets of some of his hometown's most prominent residents.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock travels to Las Vegas to defend a friend, Lt. Jim Manning, charged with murdering his girlfriend, Laura, a young woman who was living a double life.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Disagreeable London-based American businessman Albert Gordon is shot dead. His son Eric is the prime suspect. Believing Eric's innocent, sister Laura plans a mock trial hoping to uncover new evidence. Ben travels to London to defend Eric.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man in jail.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: What begins as a simple home burglary evolves into a very strange series of events for professional thief Kevin Gilliam.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Special-guest star Jill Haworth portrays a glamorous double agent, who uses her feminine wiles on Paris to set him up for an enemy plot on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps falls in love with a woman that the IMF has been assigned to bring out of an iron curtain country over the seemingly insurmountable obstacles set in their way by the country's secret police in the "Decoy"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Before the IMF can get the prototype of an Iron Curtain country's secret weapon to the United States, part of the weapon falls into the hands of an unscrupulous, greedy nightclub owner, in "The Amateur"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: While rescuing an imprisoned patriot, Barney is critically wounded and must be left behind in order for the IMF to complete their mission in the "Hunted" episode of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris, still in his cover from a completed mission, is kidnapped and held hostage by a group of treacherous revolutionists in "The Hostage" on Paramount Television's award-winning series "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to free John Darcy, the leader of a liberation movement in West Africa, and end the tyrannical rule of his captor, Colonel Alex Kohler, a ruthless segregationist in the "Kitara"

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers takes viewers to B. Smith's Restaurant. After viewing the restaurant's walk-in refrigerator, Mister Rogers and Ms. Smith make a custard dessert. Barbara Smith gives Queen Sara a napkin commemorating her new restaurant.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about how people make chalk. Mayor Maggie reports that all of the vacuum sweepers in Westwood are missing. King Friday assigns Lady Aberlin, Mayor Maggie and Prince Tuesday to find the missing vacuums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets with some children who are making crafts at the Inner City Art Center in Los Angeles. In Make-Believe, Lady Elaine's friends help her conquer her fears.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely look at snow globes and see a film about how people make cereal. King Friday says he is the bravest and strongest in the neighborhood. Cereal is falling like snow. Mister Rogers goes to a Tae Kwon Do class.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers returns a scarf to one of Mr. Brewer's puppets which makes the puppet feel brave and strong. Elsie Jean Platypus tells Lady Abelrin that the cereal quit falling on her because she was not afraid of it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use tuning whistles. Daniel has the idea to give the cereal to people who might need food. Neighbor Aber brings a forklift to gather all the boxes. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que el abuelo les explica a los bebés lo que significa el día de San Valentín y Angélica le dispara a Firulais con flechas de Cupido, los bebés deciden que deben encontrarle una novia a Firulais y que esa será Fluffy.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica les advierte a los Rugrats que la estación del otoño es un momento de cambios y que no siempre son buenos. Cuando el abuelo Lou decide mudarse a una residencia para mayores, los bebés temen que Angélica tenga razón.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy cree que el abuelo se fue por culpa de Reptar y por eso los bebés entierran todos los juguetes de Reptar. Cuando Tommy va a decírselo al abuelo, encuentra a Lou bailando salsa en una camilla de paramédicos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats intentan detener al otoño y sus cambios al evitar el desfile del Festival de Otoño, pero es Stu y su Reptar animatrónico quienes detienen todo. Confiados en que fueron sus esfuerzos, los Rugrats festejan su éxito.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Kimi pide prestada a Cynthia para ponerla en una casa del árbol/ Cuando a Dil se le cae el chupón de la boca, toma un rápido paseo por el barrio./Carlitos teme nunca ser un buen “hermano mayor”.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats están convencidos de que Dil está atrapado en la computadora de Stu/Phil y Lily se convierten en cocineros gourmet/ Angélica prueba un poco del pastel de chocolate prohibido.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica se da cuenta de que es la única que no tiene hermanos/ Cuando los bebés ven a Firulais durmiendo y teniendo un “susto nocturno”, lo rodean con objetos personales/Kimi se enamora de una piñata en forma de conejo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que Angélica le dice a Carlitos que tiene una madrastra y una hermanastra, él cree que su vida se está convirtiendo en la de Cenicienta. (Con la participación de Kimi)

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y los bebés salvan a Stu del par de zapatos más obstinado del mundo/Tommy y Carlitos se preguntan qué piensan Dil y Firulais/Los McNulty desafían a los Rugrats por el territorio en la lavandería.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos y Kimi van a la guardería donde, según Angélica, ¡van unos niños escalofriantes!/Carlitos, Kimi y Tommy intentan descifrar el misterio detrás de una baranda especial/Los bebés escuchan que habrá estrellas fugaces.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con Kira y Kimi en su casa, Carlitos ve cambios por todas partes/ Tras bastidores en un espectáculo mágico, los Rugrats descubren magia verdadera/Lulú cuida a los Rugrats en la residencia de ancianos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Phil y Lily oyen a Lulú preguntarle a un ronco Howard si el “gato le ha comido la lengua”, solicitan la ayuda de todos los bebés/Tommy intenta rescatar el biberón de Dil/Kira y Chas creen que Kimi se está alejando de ellos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los intentos de Angélica de ganarle a Susie van demasiado lejos./Mientras Didi intenta descubrir por qué Dil odia bañarse, una secuencia de fantasía nos muestra por qué se queja/Los bebés se enamoran de las capacidades de Kimi.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés se convencen de que un ejército de bacinicas está tras ellos/Angélica rompe accidentalmente el teléfono de Charlotte y guardar el secreto casi la vuelve loca/Kimi oculta el reloj de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés van a un almuerzo de negocios. / Tommy le explica a Dil cómo funcionan las cosas de la casa. / Cuando Carlitos teme que Kimi sea enviada de regreso a Japón, él y los otros bebés intentan hacer que su “último día” sea el mejor.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Phil tiene muchos problemas para dejar de ver su programa favorito de TV/Tommy le explica a Dil los principios básicos de la vida en el patio trasero/Angélica realiza su versión de un programa de entrevistas.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando la tía T. visita a los Carmichael para celebrar Kwanzaa, le dice a Susie que este día es para honrar el legado de su maravillosa gente. Al no haber ganado premios como el resto, Susie cree que no es magnífica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats viajan al futuro y son diez años más grandes. Angélica aún los atormenta, Carlitos usa frenos, Tommy tiene cabello y Dil habla… Además, ahora van a la escuela y están a punto de asistir a su primer concierto “para grandes”.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats viajan al futuro y son diez años más grandes. Angélica aún los atormenta, Carlitos usa frenos, Tommy tiene cabello y Dil habla… Además, ahora van a la escuela y están a punto de asistir a su primer concierto “para grandes”.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica y Susie comienzan las clases y compiten para ver quien es “la mejor preescolar” y la favorita de la maestra, hasta que su rivalidad las lleva a ocasionar un desastre y tienen que trabajar juntas para solucionar su error.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos debe hacerle frente a Angélica después de que ella convence a los bebés de que se convertirán en lo que se disfracen para Halloween.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy se siente rechazado cuando Firulais pone toda su atención en Fifi, hasta que se revela la causa: Fifi acaba de tener muchos cachorritos.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Comienza a nevar en Fondo de Bikini y todos sus habitantes salen a jugar en la nieve. Bob Esponja, Patricio y Calamardo hacen una guerra de bolas de nieve / Don Cangrejo le vende a Bob Esponja un sombrero por poco dinero

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja aparece por un segundo en un anuncio del Crustáceo Cascarudo. Al día siguiente Bob está convencido que será una superestrella / Cansado de los insultos de Don Cangrejo, Calamardo renuncia a su empleo

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja deberá probar que es rudo para poder ingresar a la Escupidera de Salty / Calamardo convierte el Crustáceo Cascarudo en un restaurante muy fino .para impresionar a su rival de la secundaria, Calamarino Elegante.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Después de ver una película en la noche en donde los robots se apoderan del mundo, Bob Esponja está convencido de que Don Cangrejo es un robot / Bob Esponja y Patricio Estrella se vuelven padres de un bebé molusco

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio tienen que pintar el living de la casa de Don Cangrejo, sin dejar que caiga una gota de pintura / En este episodio, aprenderás como lograr convertirte en un empleado del Crustáceo Cascarudo

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Con su nuevo kit de planee su propia fiesta, Bob Esponja decide organizar una fiesta en grande. Nadie se la pasa bien hasta que Bob Esponja se queda encerrado fuera de la casa

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio Estrella ponen un negocio de venta de barras de chocolate puerta a puerta / Chico Percebe está muy enojado, porque siempre lo tratan como un bebé y nunca lo respetan

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into Ulti and Page One, members of the Tobi Roppo from the Animal Kingdom Pirates. Hearing that he aims to become the King of the Pirates, the brother and sister duo become infuriated and turn themselves into massive beasts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Evading Ulti and Page One, strong members of the Tobi Roppo, Luffy tries to find out what Kaido's son Yamato's motive is. However, the two get in a fight. Taking Luffy's punishing attacks, Yamato remembers someone he fought against in the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members who were on board Law's Polar Tang finally reach Onigashima and see someone who they didn't expect. Kaido's son Yamato starts telling his story to Luffy, shares his passion, and reveals what's behind his mask!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At the back entrance of Onigashima, the Akazaya members try to get inside the gate, but they're blocked by their former colleague Kanjuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaido's plan to obtain the great treasure infuriates Orochi, but his unexpected violent move silences everyone. Meanwhile at the back entrance of Onigashima, Kikunojo squares off against Kanjuro and gets into an emotional fight with her former colleague.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members start charging towards Kaido from the back of Onigashima. Meanwhile, at the Performance Floor, Kaido closes in on Momonosuke shivering in terror and asks him the ultimate question which will determine his fate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members deliver a crushing blow to Kaido. Luffy and Yamato try to back them up, but Ulti stands in their way and Big Mom spots Luffy. Meanwhile, Nami and Carrot free themselves from their enemies and move on to take back Zeus!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Animal Kingdom Pirates gasp with surprise to see thousands of samurai warriors coming into the castle. In his dragon form, Kaido goes outside to fight the Akazaya members under the moon/

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shinobu tries to rescue the weakened Momonosuke but is found by King and attacked. On the other hand, Nami takes back Zeus from Big Mom and runs away but loses him again and gets chased by Zeus who is ordered to kill to her by Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky faces Big Mom with the help of Robin and Jimbei, but the Numbers come interrupting their battle. One of them holds Brachio Tank with Usopp and Chopper inside in his hand. Meanwhile, Yamato finally meets his son Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Minks struggle with a poor hand against the Gifters, Kin'emon tries to assist them, but Dogstorm and Cat Viper stop him and start fighting for the other Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who's-Who invites Drake and Hawkins to a plot to kill Queen. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats are facing two large monsters that remind them of the Giant who they once struggled to take down. As Luffy charges towards them, someone unexpected comes in to help.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Drake vows to fight alongside Luffy, but Zoro becomes skeptical and challenges him to a fight. Meanwhile, Usopp's practical joke pushes Nami into confronting Ulti, who is infuriated since her brother got attacked.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen uses a new version of the Plague Bullets which will turn the samurai into ogre-like monsters. Meanwhile, the Minks keep pushing the fight against the Gifters and drive Jack into a corner. However, Kaido stands up for his subordinate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy is hurrying to the rooftop and Yamato is trying to catch up to Momonosuke to protect him, the Akazaya members finally face off against Kaido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen, the Lead Performer, blazes away at samurai on the Performance Floor with the special version of the Plague Rounds, which turns them into hideous ogres that corner Zoro and Drake

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: King orders his subordinates to go after Momonosuke. Shinobu tries to protect him, but they are cornered by one of the strong Lead Performers from the Animal Kingdom Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato fights Sasaki and the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division to protect Momonosuke. Meanwhile, Zoro tries to get rid of the Gifters who have turned into Ice Oni, but Queen starts a horrible game which involves the antibody for the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ulti and Page One of the Tobi Roppo chase Nami and Usopp, after being infuriated by their attack as well as Luffy's declaration of becoming the King of the Pirates. Cornered, Nami gives in and Ulti pushes her to say the unthinkable.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Carrot and Wanda step in to help Marco, who is cornered by Big Mom and Perospero. In the meantime, Yamato fights a fierce battle against the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division led by Sasaki, while protecting Shinobu and Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Drake continue to chase Apoo to get the antibody against Ice Oni, while Chopper is trying to figure out how to fight the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hears a woman's scream for help and dashes into the room the scream can be heard from. However, it's a trap set up by Black Maria of the Tobi Roppo. Meanwhile, Luffy and Jimbei who are trying to reach the rooftop get help from the unexpected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Kaido begins the New Onigashima Project, Marco appears in front of Chopper and the others, who are struggling with Ice Oni. The members of the Tobi Roppo continue to give the Straw Hats a hard time while their former member helps Zoro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu that he once confronted a man, who came to Onigashima looking to get Kaido's head. His name was Ace. The two of them engaged in a fierce battle that eventually turned into an important friendship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The formidable Lead Performers of the Animal Kingdom Pirates stand in Zoro's way as he tries to get to the rooftop. Marco sees his late comrade in Zoro's determination and tries to pave the way for him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu about how Ace gave him hope for the future. Meanwhile, Luffy and the other allied pirates from the Worst Generation make it to the rooftop to finally face off against Kaido and Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's strong attack reminds Kaido of all the strong ones he's ever met. On the other hand, Luffy, Law, and Kid keep quarreling amongst themselves. Meanwhile, Sanji is caught and interrogated by Black Maria in what he calls "heaven."

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: Hell House LLC.

programme.desc: Based on the terrifying novel by Stephen King... After the Creed family moves to rural Maine, they stumble upon an ancient burial ground with sinister powers. When tragedy strikes, a perilous chain of events unleashes an unfathomable evil.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Según el rival de Ash, Gary, se han descubierto fósiles de Pokémon extintos en el área, iniciando una gran fiebre de fósiles en el cañón. ¡Ash decide unirse a las excavaciones para tratar de derrotar a Gary!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash duerme pacíficamente hasta que es despertado por Brock y Misty con alarmantes noticias: ¡Algo le pasa a la voz de Pikachu! Preocupado, Ash corre con Pikachu en busca del Centro Pokémon más cercano.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes caminan por la campiña, notan un anuncio de "Personas desaparecidas" con un rostro innegablemente conocido: ¡es exactamente igual que James del Equipo Rocket! ¿De verdad es él el del anuncio?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes discuten el rumor de que un raro Farfetch’d salvaje ha sido visto en el área. Tanto Ash como Misty prometen atraparlo, ¡y pronto tienen su oportunidad cuando el Pokémon aparece!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Al dejar el Centro Pokémon, nuestros héroes discuten lo que creen que saldrá del huevo Pokémon que Ash descubrió. Cerca, el Equipo Rocket comienza a empollar otro atrevido plan para hacerlo suyo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En una batalla con el Rhyhorn de otro Entrenador, el bulbo en la espalda de Bulbasaur empieza a brillar. Ash lo lleva al Centro Pokémon del lugar. Pronto descubren que Bulbasaur no está enfermo, ¡se prepara para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En su camino hacia la Isla Cinnabar, nuestros héroes se unen con la Oficial Jenny y con el Growlithe de la fuerza policíaca en un entrenamiento especial, esperando mejorar las habilidades de batalla de Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En un breve descanso para almorzar, Ash y sus amigos conocen a Todd Snap, un fotógrafo Pokémon que intenta conseguir una toma perfecta de Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que hace tiempo que no gana ninguna Medalla de Gimnasio, Ash se inscribe al Examen de Admisión de la Liga Pokémon, ¡una gran oportunidad para demostrar que puede convertirse en un Maestro Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y los chicos deciden visitar un centro de crianza que vieron en un comercial. Sin embargo, el centro encubre un plan diabólico de los miembros del Equipo Rocket, Butch y Cassidy, ¡viejos rivales de Jessie y James!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Misty y Jessie compiten para ser la Reina del Festival de la Princesa! Ash y Brock le prestan a Misty sus Pokémon para la batalla, y Jessie es derrotada a pesar de su Pokémon sorpresa.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Es Día del Niño, y Ash y sus amigos ayudan a unos niños de una escuela a celebrarlo. El Equipo Rocket arruina la diversión llevándose a un niño en vez de a Pikachu. En un asombroso giro de eventos, Meowth se vuelve bueno… ¿o no?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes viajan a la Isla Cinnabar, donde Ash busca ganar la Medalla Volcán. Un extraño les dice acertijos para llegar al Gimnasio, ¡donde Ash y Pikachu tienen una feroz batalla con un Pokémon que nunca habían visto!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash finalmente localiza el Gimnasio, ¡suspendido sobre una piscina de lava fundida! Sólo un fuerte Pokémon tipo Fuego puede ayudarlo en esta batalla por la Medalla Volcán, así que Ash debe confiar en su malcriado Charizard.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Mientras Ash y los chicos se apresuran a abordar el último transbordador hacia la Isla Cinnabar, son desviados por un grupo de Squirtle, Wartortle y Blastoise que necesitan su ayuda.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: El Horsea de Misty necesita ejercicio desesperadamente, y los chicos deciden llevarlo al Gimnasio de sus hermanas en Ciudad Celeste. Ahí, ella descubre que sus hermanas están planeando un emocionante ballet bajo el agua.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Brock y Misty se desvían camino a Ciudad Viridian cuando todas sus pertenencias desaparecen. Mientras buscan sus cosas perdidas, se ven envueltos en un encuentro cercano que de verdad está fuera de este mundo.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes llegan a Ciudad Viridian, donde Ash espera ganar la Medalla Tierra. Llegan al Gimnasio justo a tiempo para ver a su rival, Gary, derrotado por un Pokémon desconocido, ¡y Gary insiste en que es maligno!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En su camino de vuelta a Pueblo Paleta, nuestros héroes encuentran a un Mr. Mime fugitivo. Ash se disfraza como otro Mr. Mime para poder acercarse. Cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca... ¿atraparán al Mr. Mime correcto?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes encuentran una desviación en el camino y deciden escalar una escarpada y peligrosa montaña. Pikachu se pierde, y todos deben trabajar juntos para encontrarlo, mantener el calor y enfrentar una tormenta.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Al visitar al Profesor Oak, Ash se encuentra con Gary, y hablan de la próxima Liga Pokémon. El Profesor Oak dice que deberían aprender uno del otro en vez de competir, ¡y su trabajo rinde frutos cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash se une a su mamá en sus vacaciones en la Isla Espuma. Ahí, busca al programador del Pokédex para aprender de la inusual Evolución de SlowPoké. ¡El misterio es revelado por la incompetencia del Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash fracasa al intentar surfear, Victor lo rescata y le cuenta acerca de Humungadunga, una ola gigante que aparece cada 20 años. ¿Podrán Ash y Pikachu darle a Victor la confianza necesaria para montar la ola gigante?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: De vuelta a Pueblo Paleta, Ash y sus amigos conocen a Florinda de la guardería. Su Gloom no evoluciona y cree no estarlo entrenando bien. Cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca, todos ven lo fuerte que puede volverse un Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Un famoso director llega al pueblo, y todos quieren ser la estrella! Como él sólo quiere Pokémon en su película, Ash, Brock, Misty y el Equipo Rocket luchan para asegurarse que su Pokémon la protagonice junto a Wigglytuff.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando los chicos asisten al estreno de “Pokémon enamorado”, Meowth recuerda su doloroso pasado. Comparte la historia de su vida ante el Equipo Rocket, incluyendo cómo aprendió a caminar y a hablar como humano.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: A sólo tres semanas de iniciar la Liga Pokémon, Ash, Brock y Misty se dirigen al Monte Hideaway a buscar a uno de Élite 4. Buscan consejos de entrenamiento Pokémon, ¡pero descubren una tierra de enormes Onix en su lugar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Mientras Ash y Brock entrenan para la Liga Pokémon, hallan un templo con fósiles Pokémon. Misty recuerda una ciudad oculta donde la gente construye templos para los Pokémon. ¿Será esta la antigua ciudad de Pokémopolis?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Camino al torneo de la Liga Pokémon en la Meseta Añil,, los chicos conocen a otro Entrenador. Desafortunadamente, sus Medallas de Gimnasio son robadas, así que no puede competir... ¡a menos que se lleve las medallas de Ash!

programme.desc: An earthquake unearths a shadowy evil Woogy who promptly takes over the gasman on the Halliwell premises who promptly takes over Phoebe, who as a child most feared the Woogyman the girls’ grandma always talked about.

programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When an embezzler, Jimmy Ray, returns to Sparta after many years away, it stirs up old resentments as he encounters the families that he stole from years ago, including Virgil Tibbs’ sweet-natured Aunt Etta, who turns to Chief Gillespie for help.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An impending trial will force Gillespie’s daughter Lana Farren to face her attackers, Carl DeLissa and Jack Smet. Meanwhile, mobster attorney Alvin Epp and his corrupt clients are determined to acquire her property for a large land development.

programme.desc: Ali's MRI comes back negative to the relief of Leah. Jenelle juggles finding peace with her mom and dealing with Kieffer's domestic charges. Kailyn tries a new form of birth control. Chelsea fends for herself after surgery.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn adjusts to being alone for the holidays. Jenelle regrets filing charges against Kieffer. Leah works to make the holidays special for the twins. Chelsea and Adam make up but Randy bans Adam from the holiday celebration.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ali may have a genetic disorder. Jenelle and Kieffer must face court for their breaking and entering charges. Chelsea finds out that her old friend is pregnant. Kailyn gets annoyed when she notices Jo's not around for Issac.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kieffer is upset that Jenelle hung out with an old boyfriend. Leah is relieved that Ali has no major genetic disorder. Adam slips back into his old ways, much to the dismay of Chelsea. Kailyn considers filing for child support.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle moves in with her friend after fighting with Barb, and Kieffer reenters the picture. Chelsea's relationship with Adam is going downhilll. Ali may still have a genetic problem. Jo confronts Kailyn about child support.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle fights with both Kieffer and Tori. Chelsea struggles to deal with Adam breaking up with her. Leah is livid when Adam wants to buy a truck instead of moving. Jo appeals Kailyn's child support request.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn's child support hearing is postponed and Jo meets Jordan for the first time. Jenelle is sentenced to probation. Chelsea struggles to get over Adam. Corey finds out that Leah cheated on him two weeks before their wedding.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle decides to go to rehab. Chelsea works toward her GED. Leah files for divorce in order to protect her custody rights. Jo visits Issac during the week and Kailyn hooks up with Jordan, even though she's still with Jo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Delante de Fernando, Gabriela echa a Sara de la hacienda y le dice que ha decidido quedarse sola con su esposo. Norma tiene un mal presentimiento mientras Dínora vigila día y noche a su presa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora amenaza a Gabriela con lastimar a Martín si la delata de nuevo con la policía. Armando y Rosario visitan a Fernando y se enteran de que Dínora se esconde en la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario le reclama a Dínora por obligar a Gabriela a echar a Sara, y le aconseja a Martín que huya de la hacienda. Fernando lo traslada al primer piso para que no descubra a su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le promete a su hija que no la abandonará jamás, Pepa inspecciona la nueva habitación de su amigo y amenaza a Fernando con denunciarlo por abuso. Los Reyes le dan la bienvenida a Sara.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta pierde los límites y planea su venganza contra Paula en un juego que puede salirle muy caro. Beatriz le exige a Sofía pagar la fianza de Efraín y Amador o la delatará por su crimen. Don Emilio recibe ayuda de unos nobles campesinos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José le rompe el corazón a Paula cuando le revela las mentiras de Sofía sobre su padre. Ella decide escapar a la capital para refugiarse de su realidad en casa de Adela. Modesto sale de la hacienda para un encuentro que causará sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan sigue los rastros de Paula hasta dar con su paradero para convencerla de regresar. Sofía no logra el perdón por las malas acciones que deciden su destino. Emilio revela a Modesto quién es el culpable del secuestro.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula tiene que dejar a Juan por exigencia de José, todo para mantenerse al lado del hombre que ama, pero lejos de su corazón. Julieta sabe que llegó la hora de su venganza. Sofía llega a la casa de los Millán.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: David reflexiona y está dispuesto a asumir su paternidad. Antonia jura que ese bebé no va a nacer, asegura que alguien se encargará de interrumpir el embarazo de Cecilia. Identifican a Lucho en el hospital y él logra escapar. Macario visita a Ramiro.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: En venganza por la paliza de Max, Lucas sigue a su madre hasta la tumba del Tigre. Allí le lanza una piedra a Francisca en la cabeza, dejándola en estado grave. Poncia ya sabe la verdad de Constanza y Gabriela Suárez. Lucho e Irene hacen el amor.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro se lleva una foto de Lucho de la comisaría, se la muestra a su hija y ella dice que es el duende. Francisca tiene un mensaje del Tigre para Verónica, que le pide que ataque a sus enemigos. Antonia Guerra busca a Cecilia para invitarla a cenar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica activa un nuevo plan en el que Max hace una serie de denuncias contra Antonia y Aníbal por haberlo coaccionado a cederles las tierras del Chamuco. Villegas enfurece. Valentina y Alejandro saben que Antonia roba el dinero de la joven.
